title: 10 Highest-Grossing Movies of 2025
text:
Complete ranking of 2025's highest-grossing films:

1. Ne Zha 2 - $2.2 billion. A Chinese animated film that made history as the first non-American film to top the annual box office. It completely overtook the box office in 2025 to become the highest-earning theatrical release of the year.

2. Zootopia 2 - $1.4 billion. Disney's sequel reuniting characters Nick Wilde and Officer Judy Hopps. Described as the biggest American-released film of the year.

3. A Minecraft Movie - $1+ billion. The video game adaptation that overcame early ridicule to become the first 2025 film crossing the billion-dollar threshold.

4. Lilo & Stitch - $1+ billion. Disney's live-action remake of the 2002 classic, marking a turnaround for the studio's remake strategy after earlier disappointments.

5. Jurassic World Rebirth - $869 million. A franchise reboot with Scarlett Johansson. Notable as the first Jurassic World film failing to reach $1 billion.

6. Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle - $780 million. An anime continuation earning recognition as one of 2025's biggest surprise hits.

7. Avatar: Fire & Ash - $760+ million. James Cameron's sequel still in theaters, off to a terrific start with strong potential to surpass $1 billion.

8. How to Train Your Dragon - $636 million. DreamWorks' live-action remake with original director Dean DeBlois returning.

9. F1 - $630 million. Starring Brad Pitt, this original sports drama proved there is still room for fresh, original ideas in Hollywood.

10. Superman - $616 million. James Gunn's DC reboot, establishing the new DC Cinematic Universe with widespread success.
